_note: Strict, recipe-owned spec read by c-eval-runner. A brand may layer brand-overrides/<slug>/acceptance.json to TIGHTEN thresholds (same id wins; new ids appended). See cfw-skills-pack/docs/skills-audit.md §4.

checks.desc: (a) Captions are visible + legible in the lower band, brand accent on emphasis word, NOT overlapping the speaker face.
(b) Latin script only — zero Devanagari or other non-Latin glyphs in the caption band.
(c) All takeover-window frames show an opaque full-frame motion-graphics card OR a b-roll clip — no blank or partially-rendered frames.
(d) Cinematic grade is subtle — skin tones look natural, no blown-out highlights or crushed shadows.
(e) No black or empty frame anywhere in the reel including during graphics/b-roll takeovers.
(f) B-roll beats show the correct clip trimmed to the planned window; no incorrect footage, no bleed from adjacent beats.
VO audio is audible (non-silent) during EVERY takeover window (both graphics and b-roll) — the speaker narration is the single never-cut voice bed.
Frame 0 (cover) shows the money-shot from cover_at — not black, not a hook-animation blank, not a faded-in opener.
